name: Phone Camera Control
author: alexanderc45
description: Adds VR-style head-look to ANY BeamNG camera mode (orbit, hood, cab, chase, free) using a real phone's pose, plus optional 6DOF position. Accepts phone orientation over UDP from the bundled web client (DeviceOrientation -> relay) or from the free LOTA iOS app streaming ARKit pose as OSC. Intended for handheld-style video recording.
tagline: Use your phone as a virtual camera for cinematic in-game recordings
